news.headline: Alterra IOS buys 16 outdoor storage sites from TruGreen in 25-year leaseback deal, totaling 34.8 acres. TruGreen has over 2.3M customers.
news.summary: Alterra IOS, a key player in the industrial outdoor storage sector, has acquired 16 IOS locations comprising 34.8 usable acres from TruGreen, the largest lawn care service provider in the US. With over 300 sites acquired nationwide, this acquisition adds to Alterra IOS's portfolio. TruGreen currently serves approximately 2.3 million residential and commercial customers through 275+ branches across the country. The properties were obtained through a 25-year triple-net (NNN) sale-leaseback acquisition deal.

Global amyloidosis therapeutics market to exceed US$ 6.3B by 2035 at 8.2% CAGR, driven by rising disease prevalence and R&D investments.
news.summary: The global amyloidosis therapeutics market was valued at US$2.7 billion in 2024 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 8.2% from 2025 to 2035, ultimately reaching US$6.3 billion by 2035. The rise in prevalence of amyloidosis and investments in healthcare infrastructure are driving this growth. Amyloidosis is a rare condition characterized by abnormal protein deposition, and advancements in diagnostic tools and treatments are fueling market expansion. Key players in the market include Pfizer Inc., Johnson & Johnson, GSK plc, and Amgen Inc., who are focused on innovative drug development and market expansion through collaborations and acquisitions. Notable developments include FDA approval of Ionis and AstraZeneca's WAINUA for the treatment of hereditary transthyretin-mediated amyloidosis and advancements by Alnylam Pharmaceuticals. The market is rapidly evolving with a focus on personalized therapies and targeted treatments to improve patient outcomes.

news.headline: 2bcloud announces new leadership structure to enhance customer value, focusing on cloud investments in 2025.
news.summary: In New York on February 24, 2025, 2bcloud announced significant leadership changes aimed at enhancing customer value through cloud investments. The company's renewed focus on delivering real customer value underpins these changes, emphasizing the importance of maximizing returns for clients. This strategic realignment underscores 2bcloud's commitment to prioritizing customer needs and optimizing their cloud investments. With these key leadership alterations, 2bcloud is set to drive impactful results for its customer base, solidifying its position as a customer-centric cloud service provider.

news.headline: ohDEER expands to Midwest with first female franchisees, Jeri Lucco and Sarah, offering all-natural pest control.

The mother-daughter team, Jeri Lucco and Sarah, are leading this expansion. This development comes at a time when the company aims to address deer, tick, and mosquito control in the region. The move is set to bring a fresh approach to combating pests, with a focus on environmentally friendly solutions. The expansion marks a notable milestone as ohDEER continues to establish a foothold in the region.

news.headline: SEC ends investigation into Robinhood's cryptocurrency unit without enforcement action. Investigation began May 2024. Regulatory shift hinted. (Number of characters: 131)
news.summary: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has closed its investigation into Robinhood's cryptocurrency operations without taking any enforcement action. This comes after a period of increased scrutiny on digital asset firms. The SEC's Enforcement Division concluded the inquiry on Friday with a letter to Robinhood. The investigation, which started in May 2024, examined Robinhood's crypto services such as asset listings, custody practices, and trading operations. Initial concerns raised the possibility of securities law violations. Despite this regulatory pressure, Robinhood has since confirmed the conclusion of the SEC's investigation. This move suggests a potential shift in regulatory oversight of cryptocurrency operations.

news.headline: Famiglia Casadei selects Colangelo & Partners as its agency of record from Tuscany, a renowned ethical viticulture company.

This collaboration signifies the joining of Famiglia Casadei, an esteemed player in the industry, with the reputable integrated communications agency, Colangelo & Partners, known for their specialization in fine wine, spirits, and food.

news.headline: Trump signed memo restricting Chinese investment in the US.
news.summary: On Friday, President Trump signed a memo aimed at limiting Chinese investment in the U.S. The measure seeks to restrict the amount of funding coming from China into American businesses. This move is part of ongoing efforts to address concerns over economic ties between the two countries. The memorandum is expected to impact the flow of significant capital from China into various sectors of the U.S. economy.

news.headline: Jack Daniel's releases 14-Year-Old Tennessee Whiskey for the first time in a century, alongside 12-Year-Old and 10-Year-Old batches.
